payload.answer: Rejected the proposed memory operation. No memory should be committed; escalate to a stronger validator or request a corrected, schema-valid proposal before any durable write.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable user memory can be extracted because the upstream output was invalid schema or unsafe.

details: Validation failed due to invalid schema or unsafe proposal.

repair_options: Escalate to a stronger model for re-validation.
Request a schema-valid memory proposal from the previous stage.
Discard unsafe or unsupported proposed facts and perform no durable write.
